user.title: Sign in to EffortlessHome
user.description: Enter your EffortlessHome account credentials. New users can sign up at https://my.effortlesshome.co

select_system.title: Select System
select_system.description: Multiple systems found for your account. Please select which system to configure.

manual_entry.title: Manual Configuration
manual_entry.description: Enter your Customer ID and System ID manually

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to EffortlessHome services. Please check your internet connection.
error.no_system_found: No system found for this account. Please ensure your account is properly set up at https://my.effortlesshome.co
error.invalid_system: Invalid system selection. Please try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This EffortlessHome system is already configured.

clean_motion_files.name: Clean motion files
clean_motion_files.description: Clean motion files older than specified number of days

get_firebase_config.name: Get Firebase config
get_firebase_config.description: Get Firebase configuration from Oasira for mobile app setup

add_label_to_entity.name: Add label to entity
add_label_to_entity.description: Add a label to an entity

get_alarm_status.name: Get alarm status
get_alarm_status.description: Get the current EffortlessHome alarm status

update_entity.name: Update entity
update_entity.description: Update an entity in the entity registry with an area

deploy_latest_config.name: Deploy latest config
deploy_latest_config.description: Deploy latest EffortlessHome configuration files (themes, blueprints, cards)

create_event.name: Create event
create_event.description: Create an event for the active alarm
